LAW AND MOTION 302, PETITIONER ORACLE AMERICA, INC. MOTION FOR ORDER CONFIRMING ARBITRATION AWARD. NO APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: MOTION FOR ORDER CONFIRMING ARBITRATION AWARD IS GRANTED. NO OPPOSITION FILED. (PREVAILING PARTY TO PREPARE A FORM OF ORDER AND SEPARATE PROPOSED JUDGMENT.) JUDGE: CHARLOTTE WALTER WOOLARD, REPORTER: KENT GUBBINE CSR #5797

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF ORACLE AMERICA, INC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT IACONE, ANDREW $45,182.98 PRINCIPAL, $15,572.65 INTEREST, TOTAL JUDGMENT $60,755.63, SEE SCANNED DOC
